en: Praise the LORD!Sing to the LORD a new song, his praise in the assembly of the godly!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華， 要向耶和華唱新歌， 在聖民的會中讚美他。

en: Let Israel be glad in his Maker; let the children of Zion rejoice in their King!
zh: 願以色列因造他的主歡喜， 願錫安的居民因他們的王快樂。

en: Let them praise his name with dancing, making melody to him with tambourine and lyre!
zh: 願他們一邊跳舞，一邊讚美他的名， 擊鼓彈琴歌頌他。

en: For the LORD takes pleasure in his people; he adorns the humble with salvation.
zh: 因為耶和華喜悅自己的子民， 以救恩給謙卑的人作裝飾。

en: Let the godly exult in glory; let them sing for joy on their beds.
zh: 願聖民因所得的榮耀高興， 願他們在床上歡呼。

en: Let the high praises of God be in their throats and two-edged swords in their hands,
zh: 願稱讚 神的話常在他們口中； 願他們手裡拿著兩刃的劍，

en: to execute vengeance on the nations and punishments on the peoples,
zh: 為要報復列國， 懲罰萬民；

en: to bind their kings with chains and their nobles with fetters of iron,
zh: 用鎖鍊捆住他們的君王， 用鐵鐐鎖住他們的權貴，

en: to execute on them the judgment written! This is honor for all his godly ones. Praise the LORD!
zh: 要在他們身上施行記錄在冊上的審判。 這就是他所有聖民的尊榮。 你們要讚美耶和華。
